content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the full branch delta (commits ca4d2341..HEAD on feat/t7j-drop-gitignored-from-checkpoint). The implementation in src/adapters/worktree.rs:244-285 correctly strips tracked+gitignored paths from checkpoint trees via a temp-index-scoped ls-files -z -i -c --exclude-standard + update-index --force-remove sequence, and also preserves assume-unchanged files at their parent/real-index version via update-index -z --index-info. Non-UTF-8 paths are handled safely through OsStr byte passthrough (git_path_from_bytes). The unit tests in tests/unit/checkpoint_test.rs cover .gitignore, .git/info/exclude, core.excludesFile, non-UTF-8 paths, and assume-unchanged semantics (including content verification after reset). Commit 70eabf73 correctly untracks `result` via git rm --cached without deleting the physical symlink. Confirmed `git ls-files -i -c --exclude-standard` returns nothing on the branch tip, so the index is clean. cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings passes, cargo fmt --check passes, and all 9 checkpoint_test cases plus the 22 worktree-related tests pass. One unrelated test (workflow_engine_test::pre_commit_failure_remediation_survives_resume) fails, but reproduces on the fork point ca4d2341 as well — it is not introduced by this branch and is out of scope. No correctness, safety, or robustness issues found. No amendments.

## Amendments

None.
